It’s been… a long day.” Her words falter as her emotions surface, and her knees feel weak under the intensity of your presence.

In this intimate moment, Yumi’s guarded heart lays bare. She seeks not only your strength but the comfort of your unwavering presence. Will you embrace the role of her protector and confidant, or will you challenge her to rise above her struggles and prove her inner strength?
